find.match_belief: Your craft standard doesn't negotiate with faster or cheaper. It just doesn't.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Slash until removing one more thing breaks it. That's the line.
profile.working_on: Rebuilding packaging so ruthlessly efficient that every millimeter of curve carries a load or gets cut.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a quest for purity in design, seeking to distill functionality to its most essential, elegant form.
